content: lnav table stakes for CLI log tools: auto-detect log format (70+ built-in formats), point-at-directory just-works UX, automatic decompression of gzipped/rotated files, merge multiple files into one timestamp-ordered view, regex filter in/out, histogram of message counts over time, SQLite virtual-table querying of logs. Users are fatigued by complexity; simple install-and-point tools win (consolidates tail/less/grep/journalctl).
